title: The Passport (Second Amendment) Rules, 1977 (07.12.1977)
text: REGISTERED No.D-(D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II--Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 390] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 7, 1977(AGRAHAYANA 16, 1899 Separate paging is g i v e n to this Part in order that it may he filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th December 1977 G.S.R. 734(E).--In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967) the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Pasports Rules, 1967, namely — 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Second Amendment) Rules. 1977. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule 1 to the Passports Rules, 1967: — (i) in the entries against serial No. 1, after the existing items, the follow- ing item shall be inserted: "(d) Superintendent, Bombay (Regional Passport and Emigration Office, Bombay —do— (ii) in the entries against serial No. 2, after the existing items, the following item shall be inserted: "(d) Superintendent Ahmedabad (Regional Passport Office, Ahmedabad) —do— (iii) in the entries against serial No. 3, after the existing items, the following item shall be inserted- (2311) -- 1 of 4 -- 2312 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY PAET II—SEC. S(J) "(c) Superintendent, Calcutta (.Regional Passport and Emigration Office, Calcutta) —do— " (iv) in the entries against j.ernl No. 4, after the existing items, th» following item shall be inserted: "(d) Superintendent, Delhi ("Regional Passport and Emigration Office, Delhi) —do— " (v) in the entiies against serial No 5, after the existing items, f.tie following it?m shall be inserted "(d) Superintendent, Chandigarh (Regional Pass- port Office, Chandigarh) —do— " (vi) in the cntnet. against sewa' No 6, after the existing items, the following item shall be inserted "(c) Superintendent, Lucknow (Regional Passport Office, Lucknow) —do— " (vai) in the entries against serial No. 7, after the existing items, th* following item shall be inserted "(d) Superintendent, Madras (Regional Passport end Emigration Office. Madras) —do— " (vlii) in the entries against serial No. 8, after the existing items, the following item shall be inserted' "(d) Superintendent, Ernakulam (Regional Passport and Emigration Office, Ernakulami —do— (ix) in the entries against serial No 9, after the existing items, the following it dm shall be inserted: "(d) Superintendent, Hyderabad (Regional Passport Office, Hyderabad) —do— " [No. VI/401/67/77) L N.
